title: cuk
description: The description of a non-isolated Cuk converter excitation. Vo is negative; the magnetic returned by process_design_requirements is the input inductor L1 (single-winding, one isolation side). The output inductor L2, coupling cap C1, and output cap Co are sized internally from rules-of-thumb (ripple defaults) and emitted via get_extra_components_inputs in subsequent revisions.

inputVoltage.description: The input voltage of the Cuk

diodeVoltageDrop.description: The voltage drop on the diode

maximumSwitchCurrent.description: The maximum current that can go through the selected switch

currentRippleRatio.description: The maximum input-inductor (L1) current ripple ratio (delta-IL1 / IL1_avg)

cukOperatingPoint.description: The description of one Cuk operating point. NOTE: outputVoltages magnitudes are passed positive here; Vo is signed negative internally per Cuk polarity convention.
cukOperatingPoint.title: cukOperatingPoint
